flow:flow.mess: ¿Está seguro que desa cancelar la operación?
flow:flow.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa

qry:select.name: BUSCAR_TITULO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo FROM PER01_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG08_CS_COSTO.d_centro_costo FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG08_CS_COSTO JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_ctro_costo_ult INNER ORG08_CS_COSTO.oi_centro_costo WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=string(#SOURCE:ROWS/ROW/@id) %}) ORDER BY d_empresa ASC, e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DATOS_PERSONA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_tipo_documento, PER01_PERSONAL.c_nro_documento, PER01_PERSONAL.c_sexo, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_grupo_sanguineo, PER01_PERSONAL.f_nacim, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_local_nacim, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_nacionalidad, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_idioma, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_estado_civil, PER01_PERSONAL.c_nro_cuil, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_localidad, PER01_PERSONAL.d_email, PER01_PERSONAL.te_celular, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_foto FROM PER01_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAl.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org as oi_estructura FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org in (SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'ClsPol\') ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlestr
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estr_padre = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlhija
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_HIJAS.oi_clase_org FROM ORG02_CLASES_HIJAS WHERE ORG02_CLASES_HIJAS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlclase
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org as oi_estructura FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org = {#SOURCE:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlper
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estructura FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} AND ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp = {#FILTRO:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'CantidadDiasModificar\' ')/ROWS/ROW

flow:message.message: El legajo se marco por defecto
